name: Ecoclime Group AB (publ)
summary: Ecoclime Group AB (publ) provides real estate technology for recycling, charging, storage, extraction, and distribution of recycled and renewable thermal energy. The company is involved in the design, manufacture, construction, installation, and service of system products in circular energy systems; and sale of renewable recycled energy. It also offers indoor comfort and ventilation systems with control and optimization of temperature comfort and energy efficiency in properties. Ecoclime Group AB (publ) is headquartered in Ume√É¬•, Sweden.
